Package org.midheaven.collections

Class PipeEnumerator<Original,Final,State>

java.lang.Object
org.midheaven.collections.PipeEnumerator<Original,Final,State>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Enumerator<Final>
public class PipeEnumerator<Original,Final,State> extends Object implements Enumerator<Final>

    The selected item.

  • Method Details

    • moveNext

      public boolean moveNext()
      Description copied from interface: Enumerator
      Move the enumerator to the next item. All enumerator are create positioned before the first item.
      Specified by:
      moveNext in interface Enumerator<Original>
      Returns:
      true if the move was successful, and Enumerator.current() is safe to call.

    • current

      public Final current()
      Description copied from interface: Enumerator
      The selected item. If this method is called before calling moveNext, or no current element exists, an IllegalStateException is thrown.
      Specified by:
      current in interface Enumerator<Original>
      Returns:
      the current element

    • length

      public Length length()
      Description copied from interface: Enumerator
      The Length of the Enumerator. An Enumerators length can be infinite.
      Specified by:
      length in interface Enumerator<Original>
      Returns:
      The Length of the Enumerator
